positive: A stylized and whimsical portrait of a friendly, mythical forest creature, perhaps a fox-like spirit or an iridescent woodland beast, sitting amongst glowing flora and stylized mushrooms. The composition should be centrally focused and strong, featuring clean, graphic silhouettes of leaves and branches. Use a vibrant, high-contrast color palette emphasizing deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and pops of bioluminescent gold and magenta. The overall style should blend neo-tribal art with sophisticated nature illustration, resembling detailed linocut prints mixed with modern digital watercolor. Excellent symmetry, sharp edges, and high visual density suitable for apparel printing. Clean edges, flat color blocks contrasted with intricate line work.
negative: blurry, grainy, artifacts, signature, watermark, text, logo, low contrast, poor anatomy, multiple figures, excessive realism, photographic, sketch, cartoon, disfigured
